final:
module top_module(
  input a,
  input b,
  input c,
  output reg out
);// Implementing AND gates to generate the output
  always @(*)
    begin
      if(a && b && c)
        out = 1;
      else
        out = 0;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out = ~a & ~b & ~c;
    end
  end

endmodule
